hero.title: Welcome to LupaShop
hero.subtitle: The integrated e-commerce platform where multiple independent stores come together in one digital space. Shop from the global marketplace or visit specific partner stores.

features.title: Key Features
features.heroDescription: Discover how LupaShop revolutionizes e-commerce with integrated technology that benefits both store owners and customers.
features.ctaDescription: Join hundreds of store owners who have already discovered the power of the integrated marketplace.

integratedCatalog.title: Integrated Catalog
integratedCatalog.description: All products in one global marketplace
integratedCatalog.detail2: Advanced filters by category and price

centralizedLogistics.title: Smart Logistics
centralizedLogistics.description: Complete delivery solution and shipment management

storeManagement.title: Partner Store Management
storeManagement.description: Complete admin panels for each partner store
storeManagement.detail1: Own admin panel for each store

social.title: Social Commerce
social.description: Integrated social media and marketing tools

unifiedCheckout.title: Unified Checkout
unifiedCheckout.description: Single cart with products from multiple stores
unifiedCheckout.detail1: Cart with products from multiple stores

socialIntegration.title: Social Integration
socialIntegration.description: Connect your social networks and expand your sales

benefits.title: Why Choose LupaShop?
benefits.subtitle: A platform that benefits all sides of the e-commerce ecosystem

forStores.title: For Stores
forStores.subtitle: Grow your business
forStores.point1: Focus on your core operations while we handle logistics, payments, and marketing.
forStores.point2: Customized store pages with your branding and catalog.
forStores.point4: Access to a larger customer base through our integrated marketplace.

forCustomers.title: For Customers
forCustomers.subtitle: Unique experience
forCustomers.point1: Shop from thousands of products across multiple stores in one place.
forCustomers.point2: Advanced filters by store, category, price, and more.

shared.title: Everyone Wins with LupaShop
shared.description: A platform where store owners grow and customers find exactly what they need

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Shopping Experience?
cta.subtitle: Join LupaShop today and be part of the future of integrated e-commerce in Angola and beyond.

footer.description: Integrated e-commerce platform for Angola's businesses and customers.

hero.title: About LupaShop
hero.description: We are revolutionizing e-commerce by connecting independent stores in a unified digital marketplace, creating opportunities for both sellers and buyers worldwide.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To democratize e-commerce by providing independent stores with the tools and platform they need to compete with large retailers, while offering customers a diverse and trustworthy shopping experience.

trust.title: Trust & Transparency
trust.description: We believe in building lasting relationships based on honesty, transparency, and mutual respect between stores and customers.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We continuously evolve our platform with cutting-edge technology to provide the best experience for our community.

community.title: Community
community.description: We foster a vibrant community of entrepreneurs and shoppers, creating opportunities and connections worldwide.

cta.title: Join Our Community
cta.description: Whether you're a store owner looking to grow your business or a customer seeking unique products, LupaShop is your gateway to the future of e-commerce.
